title: Clarks Cycle Systems Road Elite Triple Compound Interchangeable Cartridge Brake Pads, Plus Extra Replacement All-Weather Cartridge Pad Inset & Retaining Pins
features: POLYCARBONATE CARRIER DESIGN - Upgrade or replace your brakes with this pair of top performing Elite Rim Brake Pads from Clarks, the perfect solution for replacing your brake pads, compatible with Shimano road bikes

ENHANCED FEATURES - Measuring 50mm in length, these brake pads have a unique design that provides top performance on wet and dry rims and improves noise reduction. They're made with aluminium or carbon-specific compounds so you can choose the best pads to match your riding needs

COMPREHENSIVE KIT - These brake pads have a stylish triple contour design in grey, black and red and can be used to replace front and rear pads, with one pair of brake pads included with each purchase along with an extra set of brake cartridges

COMPATIBILITY - These brake pads are compatible with standard rims on Shimano road bikes, giving you everything you need to ensure your bike has optimal stopping power, no matter whether you use it regularly for commuting, training or for leisure

EXCEED YOUR LIMITATIONS - Clarks Cycle Systems are a trusted cycle manufacturer with a reputation for premium products at value for money, ensuring high-quality bike parts with great design functionality and excellent performance. Become part of the Clarks family today.
description: CPS240 - Clarks Elite Road Brake Pads & Inserts Clarks Road Bike Brake Pads, designed to provide superior braking performance and reliability. Compatible with SRAM/Shimano or Campagnolo systems, our brake pads are engineered to meet the demands of serious cyclists. Specifications COMPATIBILITY: Compatible with all major brand road caliper brake systems, ensuring seamless integration with your existing setup BRAKE PAD: 50mm pads, Top performance on dry & wet rims COMPOUND: Triple compound pad for all weather conditions REPLACEABLE POWER COMPOUND INSERTS: Replaceable inserts, offering excellent power and modulation across all conditions UNIQUE DESIGN: Reduced noise and increase performance REPLACEABLE INSERTS: Supplied with a pair of replacement all-weather pad inserts, allowing you to easily maintain optimal braking performance
